description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a blue-painted lower section for enhanced grip and visibility. The axe head is made of dark, likely steel metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade and a flat poll on the opposite side. The blade is single-edged, with a sharp, slightly convex cutting edge and a thick, reinforced back for durability. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with a traditional wedged fitting visible at the top. The handle shows a natural wood grain pattern, transitioning into a painted blue grip area. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on the axe.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle, blue grip, and a dark, wedge-shaped steel blade securely mounted on top.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the curved wooden handle, blue grip, and the full profile of the dark steel blade.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the front, showing the narrow edge of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the handle's curvature, blue grip, and the blade's profile from the other side.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the flat poll of the blade and the top of the handle, with the blue grip visible at the bottom.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a blue-painted lower section for grip, oval cross-section, ergonomic and traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a convex cutting edge and flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the handle.
